basic_details.job_title: DCHS Prakasam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 25 Theatre Assistants, Office Subordinate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Prakasam (DCHS Prakasam)
basic_details.post_name: Record Assistant/MRA, Theatre Assistants, Office Subordinate, Post Mortem Asst., General Duty Attendants
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Prakasam (DCHS Prakasam) Record Assistant/MRA, Theatre Assistants, Office Subordinate, Post Mortem Assistant, and General Duty Attendants Notification 2026 has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website prakasam.ap.gov.in. A total of 25 vacancies have been announced through the DCHS Prakasam Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years as on 30-06-2026. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-Servicemen: 3 years + service; Differently abled: 10 years; Max with all relaxations: 52 years.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/10th or equivalent from a recognized Board
qualification.details: Record Assistant/MRA: Must have passed SSC/10th or its Equivalent from a recognized Board. Theatre Assistants: Must have passed SSC/10th or its Equivalent. Office Subordinate: Must have passed SSC or Equivalent from a recognized Board. Post Mortem Asst.: Must have passed SSC/10th class board examination or Equivalent from a recognized board. General Duty Attendants (MNO/FNO): Must have passed SSC/10th Class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

salary_details.details: All posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000/- Per Month.

selection_process: 75% marks in qualifying examination Up to 10 marks for experience after qualification Up to 15% weightage for Contract/Outsourcing service including COVID-19 Area weightage for service
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS Prakasam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://Prakasam.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCHS Prakasam Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCHS Prakasam Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCHS Prakasam Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCHS Prakasam Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Record Assistant/MRA: Must have passed SSC/10th or its Equivalent from a recognized Board. Theatre Assistants: Must have passed SSC/10th or its Equivalent. Office Subordinate: Must have passed SSC or Equivalent from a recognized Board. Post Mortem Asst.: Must have passed SSC/10th class board examination or Equivalent from a recognized board. General Duty Attendants (MNO/FNO): Must have passed SSC/10th Class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

content_sections.heading: DCHS Prakasam Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years as on 30-06-2026. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-Servicemen: 3 years + service; Differently abled: 10 years; Max with all relaxations: 52 years.

content_sections.heading: DCHS Prakasam Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: All posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000/- Per Month.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Applications

content_sections.heading: DCHS Prakasam Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: 75% marks in qualifying examination Up to 10 marks for experience after qualification Up to 15% weightage for Contract/Outsourcing service including COVID-19 Area weightage for service

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS Prakasam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://Prakasam.ap.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DCHS Prakasam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCHS Prakasam Recruitment 2026 is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 25 vacancies have been announced for various posts including Record Assistant/MRA, Theatre Assistants, Office Subordinate, Post Mortem Asst., and General Duty Attendants.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for all the posts is SSC/10th or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 42 years as of 30th June 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000/- Per Month for all the posts.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, while SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 300/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves marks based on the qualifying examination, experience, contract/outsourcing service weightage, and area weightage for service.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCHS Prakasam, which is https://Prakasam.ap.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the validity period of the merit list?
faq.answer: The merit list for this recruitment will be valid until 30th June 2027.
